languages.text: Опасный фузелиновый песок дается лишь в руки умелому добытчику. Неумелый же рискует остаться вовсе без рук.

traits.locale_text: Опасный фузелиновый песок дается лишь в руки умелому добытчику. Неумелый же рискует остаться вовсе без рук.

languages.text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.
languages.original_text: Опасный фузелиновый песок дается лишь в руки умелому добытчику. Неумелый же рискует остаться вовсе без рук.

traits.locale_text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.
Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.
Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.
Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.

languages.text: Gefährlich explosiver fyceliner Sand wird nur in die Hände der geschicktesten Bergleute gegeben. Die Ungeschickten laufen Gefahr, bald gar keine Hände mehr zu haben.
languages.original_text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.

traits.locale_text: Gefährlich explosiver fyceliner Sand wird nur in die Hände der geschicktesten Bergleute gegeben. Die Ungeschickten laufen Gefahr, bald gar keine Hände mehr zu haben.

languages.text: Le sable fyceline, dangereusement explosif, n'est confié qu'aux mineurs les plus compétents. Les moins habiles courent le risque de ne plus avoir de mains du tout.
languages.original_text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.

traits.locale_text: Le sable fyceline, dangereusement explosif, n'est confié qu'aux mineurs les plus compétents. Les moins habiles courent le risque de ne plus avoir de mains du tout.

languages.text: Sólo los mineros más hábiles tienen en sus manos la peligrosa y explosiva arena ficelina. Los ineptos corren el riesgo de quedarse pronto sin manos.
languages.original_text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.

traits.locale_text: Sólo los mineros más hábiles tienen en sus manos la peligrosa y explosiva arena ficelina. Los ineptos corren el riesgo de quedarse pronto sin manos.

languages.text: Tehlikeli derecede patlayıcı fyceline kumu sadece en yetenekli madencilerin ellerine teslim edilir. Beceriksiz olanlar, kısa süre sonra ellerinin hiç olmaması riskiyle karşı karşıyadır.
languages.original_text: Dangerously explosive fyceline sand is placed in the hands of only the most skilled miners. The inept ones run the risk of soon having no hands at all.

traits.locale_text: Tehlikeli derecede patlayıcı fyceline kumu sadece en yetenekli madencilerin ellerine teslim edilir. Beceriksiz olanlar, kısa süre sonra ellerinin hiç olmaması riskiyle karşı karşıyadır.
